//: Scoop manifest TEMPLATE for TinyRaven. You normally do NOT edit this by hand: the `scoops:` block in .goreleaser.yaml generates the real manifest and pushes it to the bucket repo (ravencloak-org/scoop-bucket) on each release. Users run: scoop bucket add tinyraven https://github.com/ravencloak-org/scoop-bucket ; scoop install tinyraven. VERSION/URL/HASH placeholders are filled in automatically by GoReleaser. Kept only as documentation / a manual-publish fallback.
description: Open-source, self-hosted, drop-in alternative to Tinybird (binary: tr)
